overview: Vitality Weight and Hormone Solutions is a medical clinic in Milford, CT specializing in weight loss, hormone replacement therapy, and metabolic health management. The clinic delivers personalized treatment plans combining medication management with education and lifestyle support.
highlights: Certified Diabetes Care and Education Specialist on staff
Medical weight loss with GLP/GIP and oral medications
targetAudience: Adults seeking personalized weight loss, hormone optimization, and metabolic health management, including those navigating perimenopause, menopause, and testosterone deficiency.
